summary: Tested vocabulary, field sets, and client edit features. All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend features working with minor fixes applied.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/vocabulary accessible by Admin
Backend: GET /api/admin/vocabulary accessible by Case Worker
Backend: GET /api/admin/vocabulary accessible by Volunteer
Backend: GET /api/admin/field-sets accessible by Admin
Backend: GET /api/admin/field-sets accessible by Case Worker
Backend: GET /api/admin/field-sets accessible by Volunteer
Backend: PATCH /api/clients/{id} accepts demographics object
Backend: PATCH /api/clients/{id} accepts custom_fields object
Backend: PATCH /api/clients/{id} persists all fields (name, email, phone, address, notes, demographics, custom_fields)
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id} returns persisted demographics and custom_fields
Backend: PUT /api/admin/vocabulary updates vocabulary mappings
Backend: PUT /api/admin/field-sets creates/updates field sets
Frontend: Sidebar navigation labels use vocabulary context (v() function)
Frontend: Vocabulary change in Admin Settings updates sidebar labels immediately
Frontend: Client Detail page shows Demographics section with styled cards
Frontend: Client Detail page shows Custom Fields section from field sets
Frontend: Edit Client dialog opens with pre-filled Basic Info
Frontend: Edit Client dialog has Demographics section with 6 fields
Frontend: Edit Client dialog has Custom Fields section from field sets
Frontend: Saving edited demographics persists changes
Frontend: Saving edited custom_fields persists changes
Frontend: Admin Settings > Vocabulary tab shows all vocabulary mappings
Frontend: Admin Settings > Field Sets tab shows all field sets with fields
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data (12 clients, 3 field sets)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vocabulary and Field Sets features are fully working. TenantProvider (lib/tenant.js) fetches vocabulary and field sets on login, provides v() lookup function. Sidebar uses v(item.vocabKey) for dynamic labels. ClientDetail.js shows Demographics and Custom Fields sections, Edit dialog has full editing capability. Field sets use 'label' property (not 'name') - fixed in ClientDetail.js to use field.name || field.label. Vocabulary API returns array of {default_label, custom_label} objects - TenantProvider converts to {key: value} format.

fixes_applied.issue: Vocabulary API returns array format but TenantProvider expected object format
fixes_applied.fix: Added array-to-object conversion in refreshVocab() to handle [{default_label, custom_label}] format

fixes_applied.issue: Custom fields used field.name but backend stores field.label
fixes_applied.fix: Changed to use fieldKey = field.name || field.label for both display and edit sections

vocabulary_propagation.description: Vocabulary changes in Admin Settings immediately update sidebar labels via TenantProvider context

field_sets_in_client_detail.description: Custom Fields section displays all fields from field sets with proper labels and values

client_edit_demographics.description: Edit dialog has 6 demographic fields (age_group, gender, ethnicity, language, income_level, education)

client_edit_custom_fields.description: Edit dialog renders custom fields from field sets with proper input types (text, date, number)

data_persistence.description: Demographics and custom_fields are persisted via PATCH /api/clients/{id} and visible after save
